items.title: Huge $504 discount strikes Samsung’s 40-inch Odyssey G7 180Hz WUHD gaming monitor with FREE Resident Evil Requiem
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops Samsung’s 40-inch Odyssey G7 (G75F) WUHD curved gaming monitor down to $695.99 shipped. This is regularly a $1,200 display, which means you’re looking at a straight-up $504 discount on it. That’s nearly a 50% discount on one of the latest Odyssey models that debuted towards the tail end of last year. Notably, it also comes with a FREE game code for Resident Evil Requiem worth $70 right now. We’ve only seen this monitor dip lower once before at Amazon, and today’s price lands within $46 of that low. It’s the best price we’ve tracked for this model on Amazon in 2026 so far, making it a great time to grab one and upgrade your battlestation – especially with the bonus game included. Head below for more details.

more…

Update 04/22: Walmart has now listed the new Forza Horizon 6 Limited Edition Xbox Wireless Controller at $84 shipped, which is $6 less than the official price at Microsoft and Amazon. More details about the gamepad in the original post below.

We’re now just a few weeks away from the release of Forza Horizon 6, and Xbox is getting the celebrations started early with a fresh batch of limited edition accessories. You can pre-order the new Forza Horizon 6 Limited Edition Xbox Wireless Controller and Headset. We already knew these were coming, thanks to some leaks and reports from earlier, but they’re now official, and you can pre-order your unit to be among the first to snag them. items.title: SusHi Tech Tokyo isn’t a conference — it’s a deal room with 60,000 people
items.summary: When 60,000 attendees descend on Tokyo Big Sight April 27–29, the headline numbers are hard to ignore: 750 startup exhibitors, 151 sessions, city leaders from 49 countries. But the stat that tells you what kind of event this actually is? It's 10,000 facilitated business meetings — brokered, booked, and tracked before most attendees even land.
